notes: Antigravity page shell, account overview, multi-instance, wakeup, and verification tabs are supplied by the platform package UI runtime.

Antigravity account, OAuth, quota, switching, multi-instance, runtime, wakeup, and verification commands now execute through the package sidecar adapter; the package no longer declares platform business native boundaries.
Antigravity IDE page shell, account overview, multi-instance, wakeup, and verification tabs are supplied by the platform package UI runtime.

Antigravity IDE account, OAuth, quota, switching, multi-instance, runtime, wakeup, and verification commands now execute through the package sidecar adapter; the package no longer declares platform business native boundaries.
Restores APIKEY.FUN quick add behavior from the relay page to Claude and Claude CLI.
The Claude add dialog now opens with APIKEY.FUN provider settings prefilled even when the remote UI loads after navigation.
恢复中转站快速添加到 Claude 和 Claude CLI 的预填行为。
即使 Claude 远端 UI 在跳转后才加载，也会自动打开添加弹框并带入 APIKEY.FUN 配置。
恢復中轉站快速加入 Claude 和 Claude CLI 的預填行為。
即使 Claude 遠端 UI 在跳轉後才載入，也會自動開啟新增彈框並帶入 APIKEY.FUN 設定。
Claude account overview, Claude CLI, Gateway, OAuth, quota, Desktop runtime, and multi-instance tabs are supplied by the Claude platform package UI runtime and sidecar adapter.
Claude keeps nativeBoundaries empty; Core Shell only retains package lifecycle, runtime gate, adapter runner, event bridge, and system window/open capabilities.
Zed account overview, tabs, runtime controls, and page interactions are now supplied by the Zed platform package UI runtime.
Core Shell keeps the platform package lifecycle controls while Zed page UI changes can ship through Zed package updates.
Zed platform package uses a sidecar adapter boundary for accounts, OAuth, switching, quota, and runtime commands.
Platform package lifecycle supports independent install, update, uninstall, size display, and runtime readiness checks.
Kiro account overview, multi-instance tabs, OAuth, switching, quota refresh, and page interactions are now supplied by the Kiro platform package.
Core Shell keeps only Kiro platform lifecycle controls, runtime gate, Host API, and adapter runner.
GitHub Copilot account overview, VS Code switching, OAuth, quota refresh, OpenCode sync, and multi-instance tabs are now supplied by the GitHub Copilot platform package.
Core Shell keeps only GitHub Copilot platform lifecycle controls, runtime gate, Host API, and adapter runner.
Windsurf account overview, multi-instance tabs, OAuth, token import, password login, VS Code switching, quota refresh, and page interactions are now supplied by the Windsurf platform package.
Core Shell keeps only Windsurf platform lifecycle controls, runtime gate, Host API, and adapter runner.
Cursor account overview, multi-instance tabs, OAuth, token import, switching, quota refresh, and page interactions are now supplied by the Cursor platform package.
Core Shell keeps only Cursor platform lifecycle controls, runtime gate, Host API, and adapter runner.
Gemini Cli account overview, multi-instance tabs, OAuth, token import, switching, quota refresh, launch commands, and page interactions are now supplied by the Gemini platform package.
Core Shell keeps only Gemini platform lifecycle controls, runtime gate, Host API, and adapter runner.
Trae account overview, multi-instance tabs, OAuth, token import, switching, quota refresh, launch commands, and page interactions are now supplied by the Trae platform package.
Core Shell keeps only Trae platform lifecycle controls, runtime gate, Host API, and adapter runner.
Qoder account overview, multi-instance tabs, OAuth, switching, quota refresh, launch commands, and page interactions are now supplied by the Qoder platform package.
Core Shell keeps only Qoder platform lifecycle controls, runtime gate, Host API, and adapter runner.

CodeBuddy account overview, multi-instance tabs, OAuth, token import, local import, switching, quota refresh, launch commands, and page interactions are now supplied by the CodeBuddy platform package.
Core Shell keeps only CodeBuddy platform lifecycle controls, runtime gate, Host API, and adapter runner.

CodeBuddy CN account overview, multi-instance tabs, OAuth, token import, local import, switching, quota refresh, WorkBuddy sync, launch commands, and page interactions are now supplied by the CodeBuddy CN platform package.
Core Shell keeps only CodeBuddy CN platform lifecycle controls, runtime gate, Host API, and adapter runner.

WorkBuddy account overview, multi-instance tabs, OAuth, token import, local import, switching, quota refresh, check-in, CodeBuddy CN sync, launch commands, and page interactions are now supplied by the WorkBuddy platform package.
Core Shell keeps only WorkBuddy platform lifecycle controls, runtime gate, Host API, and adapter runner.
Restores APIKEY.FUN quick add behavior from the relay page to Codex.
The Codex add dialog now opens with the APIKEY.FUN provider settings prefilled even when the remote UI loads after navigation.
恢复中转站快速添加到 Codex 的预填行为。
即使 Codex 远端 UI 在跳转后才加载，也会自动打开添加弹框并带入 APIKEY.FUN 配置。
恢復中轉站快速加入 Codex 的預填行為。
即使 Codex 遠端 UI 在跳轉後才載入，也會自動開啟新增彈框並帶入 APIKEY.FUN 設定。
Repairs Codex account migration after upgrading from legacy JSON storage to the platform account database.
When old JSON account files contain accounts missing from SQLite, the adapter now restores the missing records without overwriting existing database records.
修复从旧版 JSON 账号存储升级到平台账号数据库后，Codex 账号数量可能变少的问题。
当旧账号文件中存在 SQLite 缺失的账号时，adapter 会自动补齐缺失记录，同时不会覆盖数据库中已有账号。
修復從舊版 JSON 帳號儲存升級到平台帳號資料庫後，Codex 帳號數量可能變少的問題。
當舊帳號檔案中存在 SQLite 缺少的帳號時，adapter 會自動補齊缺少記錄，同時不會覆蓋資料庫中既有帳號。
Adds a wakeup entry in the Codex account overview. It opens the existing wakeup test dialog directly with accounts sorted by 5h quota from high to low by default.
The wakeup test account picker now supports manual sorting by default order, 5h quota, weekly quota, creation time, or email.
Codex 账号总览新增“唤醒账号”入口：直接打开现有测试唤醒弹框，账号默认按 5h 额度从高到低排序。
测试唤醒账号选择器支持手动切换排序：默认顺序、5h 额度、周额度、创建时间或邮箱。
Codex 帳號總覽新增「喚醒帳號」入口：直接開啟既有測試喚醒彈框，帳號預設依 5h 額度由高到低排序。
測試喚醒帳號選擇器支援手動切換排序：預設順序、5h 額度、週額度、建立時間或信箱。

Codex account overview, model providers, API service, local gateway, wakeup tasks, sessions, thread sync, and multi-instance tabs are supplied by the Codex platform package UI runtime and sidecar adapter.
Codex keeps nativeBoundaries empty; Core Shell only retains package lifecycle, runtime gate, adapter runner, event bridge, and system window/open capabilities.
